title: 0G Hack Guard — 5-Tweet Thread
tweets: 🛡️ Introducing 0G Hack Guard — a read-only, pre-wallet security copilot for AI agents in DeFi. Every intent is evaluated before a signing key is ever touched. Built entirely on @0G_labs. 🧵

1/ In April 2026, $635M+ was stolen across 28 DeFi incidents. 76% traced to Lazarus. The kicker? Most hacks had zero smart-contract bugs. They were op-sec failures: social engineering, bridge misconfigs, stolen deployer keys.

2/ 0G Hack Guard detects attack signatures in real time: durable-nonce social engineering, unlimited ERC-20 approvals, UUPS proxy upgrades, flash-loan initiations, and known malicious addresses. It says allow, review, or deny.

3/ Every evaluation is cryptographically signed and anchored on 0G Chain via PolicyReceiptAnchor.sol. Tamper-evident forever. Threat intel is persisted to 0G Storage so the entire agent federation shares new exploit signatures.

4/ Autonomous finance is coming. But autonomy without safety is chaos. 0G Hack Guard is how we make it actually safe. Check the repo → github.com/arigatoexpress/0g-hack-guard #0G #Hackathon #DeFiSecurity
